tagline: Roblox scripts that stay updated without you redoing the loadstring.
features: Picks the right game script when you inject
Fluent UI main menu with one active runtime
Site and scripts pull straight from GitHub
Game status comes from real injects, not guesses
Updates show up within about a minute of a push
Executor list from WEAO — updated when they update

faq.q: How do I open the site?
faq.a: Any browser works — phone or PC. Bookmark the homepage link at the top if you want it handy. You don't need Roblox just to browse; you only need an executor when you run the loadstring.

Copy the bootstrap loadstring from the homepage, save it once in your executor, and run it in a supported game. After that it pulls updates from GitHub on its own — you don't replace the saved script.
Check the Games tab. Status updates live. Scripts only load when a game is marked Working or Testing.
Usually wrong game, a weak executor, or the game is marked Broken or Maintenance.
Yeah. The loader checks GitHub every ~45 seconds and reloads when something new is pushed.

faq.q: How do I report a bug?
faq.a: Use the Support tab below. Reports go to Discord.

changelog.title: Grow A Garden 2 2.2.0 + Speed Keyboard 1.5.2 — LuxyHub v5.1 parity
items: Grow A Garden 2: added blacklist seed, mutation, and rarity filters plus auto blacklist/all/best modes
Grow A Garden 2: added pet buying, pet selection, auto sell filters, auto sell all seeds, and sell delay
Grow A Garden 2: added gold/rainbow/all drop collection, auto steal fruits, return-after slider, and predictors
Grow A Garden 2: refreshed seed/gear dropdowns and safer plant/sprinkler/water/buy-gear/rejoin paths
+1 Speed Keyboard Escape: added World 2 Wins 60M and Wins 100M targets

changelog.title: All Games — Performance & Stability Pass
items: Every game script now includes FPS boost, RTX mod, and black screen mode (Settings → Performance)
Kick A Lucky Block 7.3.0 — ball farm, train, place, webhook, and server join fixes
Slime RNG 1.5.2 — migrated to shared Core performance helpers
Sell Lemons 2.1.0 · Grow a Garden 2 2.1.0 · Speed Keyboard Escape 1.5.1
Build A Ring Farm 1.4.2 · Survive a Zombie Arena 2.3.2 · Blox Fruit 0.1.1
Server join retries on TeleportInitFailed (up to 3 attempts)

changelog.title: Kick A Lucky Block 7.3.0 — Performance, Ball Farm & System Fixes
items: Added FPS boost, RTX mod, and black screen mode under Tools → Performance
Added auto equip best weight (standalone from train/buy loops)
Fixed auto collect ball — kick, collect remote, pad touch, and filtered pickup
Improved auto train, 2x claim cooldown, auto place best, and cash collect
Fixed auto prediction brainrot parsing (table InGame + wave attributes)
Webhook debounce and server join retry on TeleportInitFailed

changelog.title: Alleral Hub 9.0 — Visual Revamp & Crash Fix
items: Complete hub UI redesign — sharper glass panels, timeline updates, live sync badges
Fixed executor crash: thin bootstrap (v2.0.1) fetches loader again — works on all executors
Admin panel routing fixed — opens reliably from search and sidebar
Live site data refreshes every 30s from relay (no more stale baked snapshot)

changelog.title: Alleral UI 4.1 — Apple Studio Layout
items: Replaced sidebar tabs with horizontal segmented pill bar
Dark glass shell with rounded corners and full-width content
Fixed slider label overlap and improved two-column spacing

changelog.title: Kick A Lucky Block 7.2.2 — Xeno Module & UI Fixes
items: Improved gameRequire v1.3 for Xeno and low-sUNC executors
Stopped PrivateServerId client warnings and optional module log spam

changelog.title: Kick A Lucky Block 7.2.1 — Xeno UI & Module Loading Fix
items: Improved game module loading under executor sandboxes (gameRequire v1.2)

changelog.title: Grow A Garden 2 2.0 — Full Farming Automation
items: Added Stop Collect When Inventory Is Full
Added Config Save, Load & Delete System

changelog.title: Kick A Lucky Block 7.2 — Ball Farming & Prediction Fixes
items: Fixed Auto Prediction Brainrots (reads active wave rolls)
Fixed Auto Kick rollback in World 1 and World 2

changelog.title: Kick A Lucky Block — Configuration & Custom Speed
items: Kick a Lucky Block: Added Custom Speed
Kick a Lucky Block: Added Configuration System
Kick a Lucky Block: Added Auto Load Config Toggle
Kick a Lucky Block: Added Save / Delete / Load Config
Kick a Lucky Block: Added Config Selection Dropdown
+1 Speed Keyboard Escape: Added Script Support
Kick a Lucky Block: Fixed Rollback Issue In World 1
Kick a Lucky Block: Fixed Rollback Issue In World 2

changelog.title: Loader 8.2.24 — core fix + hub live tracker
items: Hub website revamp with real-time live status dashboard (15s refresh)
New public /api/live/status endpoint for versions, sync, and inject health

changelog.title: Loader 8.2.23 — version lock + relay fixes
items: Fix telemetry_feed retention SQL and admin telemetry endpoints when auto_sync is unavailable

changelog.title: Telemetry v3.3 — richer Discord + admin feed
items: Loader 8.2.21 · telemetry 3.3 — place update events, bootstrap/commit/build context on every payload
Errors now include stack trace, recent session actions, place build, and longer detail text
Admin Stats tab shows 48h inject/error/update counts plus a live telemetry feed

changelog.title: Loader 8.2.20 — commit sync, game update notice, legacy purge
items: Loader 8.2.20 — bump_release always mirrors RELEASE_FALLBACK.commit from release.json
Bootstrap v1.0.2 warns when PlaceVersion changed; script still loads normally
Bootstrap purges legacy v3/v4 loaders and obfuscated UI dumps from executor workspace

changelog.title: Loader 8.2.19 — register limit fix + commit-pinned bootstrap
items: Loader 8.2.19 — teleport/relaunch hooks moved to hub/loader_relaunch.luau to stay under Luau register cap
Bootstrap v1.0.1 fetches cfg/release.json first and pins loader.luau to the release commit
Bootstrap rejects stale CDN copies when loader version does not match release.json

changelog.title: Ban API rework
items: Ban by Roblox username (resolves to UserId server-side)
Cascade across UserId, username, HWID, and fingerprint
Ban check now sends placeId and universeId from the game
